hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify' && echo 'BLOCK: --no-verify は使用禁止です' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '.golangci.yml' && echo 'BLOCK: .golangci.yml の変更は禁止です' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'eslint.config.ts' && echo 'BLOCK: eslint.config.ts の変更は禁止です' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.go"' && gofmt -w $(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"[^"]*\.go"' | tr -d '"') || exit 0
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"[^"]*\(\.vue\|\.ts\)"' | head -1 | tr -d '"'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && cd frontend && mise run lint -- --fix "../$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
cd backend && mise run lint && mise run test && cd ../frontend && mise run lint && mise run test-run
